parameters.content:
## W0 - Environment Validator

**Purpose:** Test all external connections and validate environment configuration.

**Trigger:** Manual only — run after initial setup or configuration changes.

**Tests:**
1. Environment variable presence check (all PULSE_ vars)
2. Plane.so API connectivity (list projects)
3. DeepSeek API connectivity (simple completion)
4. LobeHub webhook callback (if configured)

**Note:** DRY_RUN has no effect on W0 — validation always executes reads only.
